name: coinor-libcgl1
title: coinor-libcgl1
description:
COIN-OR Cut Generation Library
The Cut Generation Library (Cgl) is an open collection of cutting plane
implementations ("cut generators") for use in teaching, research, and
applications.
.
Cgl is part of the larger COIN-OR initiative (Computational Infrastructure
for Operations Research) and can be used with other COIN-OR packages that
make use of cuts, such as the mixed-integer linear programming solver Cbc.
.
This package contains the binaries and libraries.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use coinor-libcgl1 because COIN-OR Cut Generation Library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use coinor-libcgl1 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair coinor-libcgl1 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `coinor-libcgl1 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
